action.reasoning: Observation: Starting first iteration with no prior baseline. Analysis: Need to establish working pipeline with pretrained wav2vec2-base + simple mean-pool classifier for bonafide/spoof logits before optimizing. Decision: Implement model/train/predict scripts for 2 epochs on full train+dev (to get EER), test predict.py on small dev subset to validate contract, then submit_eval for official test score and time measurement.
action.command: python train.py && mkdir -p test_dir/flac && head -n 100 /data/dev_protocol.txt | cut -d' ' -f2 > test_dir/test.txt && for id in $(cat test_dir/test.txt); do cp /data/dev/flac/${id}.flac test_dir/flac/; done && python predict.py --data_path test_dir --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output preds.json && echo 'Predict test successful on 100 samples' && ls -lh checkpoints/best.pt preds.json
